name: Chocolate Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, allow egg whites to warm to room temperature, approximately 1 hour.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F. Place cocoa in a small bowl. Add boiling water and stir until smooth. Allow mixture to cool for about 20 minutes.
3. In another bowl, mix flour, Sugar Twin, baking soda, and Lite salt (if using). Make a well in the center and pour in the liquid butter buds, eggbeaters, vanilla extract, and cooled cocoa.
4. Beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Sprinkle cream of tartar over the egg whites. With an electric mixer on high speed, beat until stiff peaks form. Do not overbeat.
6. Pour batter over the egg whites. Using a rubber spatula or wire whisk, gently fold into the egg whites just until blended.
7. Turn batter into a 10-inch tube pan and bake at 325°F for 65-70 minutes.
8. Invert the pan over the neck of a bottle to cool completely, about 1 1/2 hours.
9. Using a spatula, carefully loosen the cake from the pan and remove it.
